transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my shower valve is backing up and it's getting bad! This is Maria Lopez at 88 Maple Ave. Dispatcher: Okay Maria, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 88 Maple Ave right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: shower valve is backing up
